steps.eval: (()=>{const tree=document.querySelector('[data-testid=artifact-tree]'); const w=document.createTreeWalker(tree,NodeFilter.SHOW_TEXT); let n; while(n=w.nextNode()){ if((n.textContent||'').trim()==='design-chat-parity-gaps'){ let p=n.parentElement; while(p&&p!==tree){ if((p.className||'').includes('cursor-pointer')){p.click(); return true;} p=p.parentElement;}}} return false;})()

(()=>{const pm=document.querySelector('.ProseMirror'); const previews=document.querySelectorAll('[data-testid*=preview], [class*=preview], [class*=Preview]'); return {previewEls: Array.from(previews).slice(0,5).map(e=>({tag:e.tagName,cls:(e.className||'').toString().slice(0,80), testid:e.getAttribute('data-testid')})), pmReadOnly: pm?.getAttribute('contenteditable'), editing: !!document.querySelector('.ProseMirror[contenteditable=true]')};})()
